_README: LOCAL notes for tipsters:extract-opinions. EXAMPLE/template content only — replace with REAL, permitted, licence-cleared notes. Never paste full copyrighted articles; use SHORT excerpts. Every opinion needs an evidence_excerpt that appears verbatim in source_text. Nothing here is a real tip; all rows extract as review_status=pending and are blocked from model-active until reviewed.

notes.source_text: EXAMPLE operator note (template). Sun Goddess (EXAMPLE) looks the strongest filly here on the figures. Venetian Sun (EXAMPLE) is feared in the sprint but the draw is a worry.

Venetian Sun (EXAMPLE) is feared in the sprint but the draw is a worry
